title: Otholobium zeyheri
taxonomy: I found that Otholobium zeyheri is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Otholobium zeyheri belongs to the subtribe Sophrideae and is part of the genus Otholobium. It is native to South Africa and is a type of legume. The classification of Otholobium zeyheri is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, class Magnoliopsida, and order Fabales. The health benefits of Otholobium zeyheri include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
